home.description: «Berehynja» is a Ukrainian space in Germany created for children, teenagers, and adults who were forced to find themselves far from home. We bring Ukrainian families together, help preserve their language, culture, and traditions, and support those who are going through the process of adaptation and integration into a new environment.

about.missionDescription: A public organization dedicated to supporting the Ukrainian community in their journey of adaptation and integration in Germany.
about.teamContent: Our team consists of dedicated volunteers and professionals who are committed to making a difference in the lives of Ukrainians in Germany. We work together to create a supportive environment where everyone can feel at home.

kids.title: Programs for Kids
kids.description: Unlock your potential through a variety of courses and workshops designed to inspire, teach new skills, and enhance your abilities.

adults.title: Programs for Adults
adults.description: Short-term courses and intensives aimed at quick adaptation, language learning, and professional development in a new environment.

cookie.title: Privacy & Security
cookie.description: We use only technical cookies. They are completely anonymous, do not collect any personal data, do not track your location, and are not used for advertising purposes.
cookie.necessary_desc: This data does not identify you personally. It is used solely for stable interface performance: remembering language preferences and protecting the site from spam or attacks.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Protecting your data is our priority. We handle information confidentially and strictly in accordance with GDPR and BDSG requirements.

controller.title: Controller
controller.desc: Berehynja is responsible for data processing on this website. Detailed contact information can be found in our Impressum.

infrastructure.title: Infrastruktur & Hosting
infrastructure.desc: All text content, links, and website logic are processed via Firebase (Google Ireland Ltd). Data is stored exclusively on servers within the EU according to the highest security standards.

cookies.title: Cookies & Tracking
cookies.desc: We only use technically necessary Cookies (Session Storage) to save your language preference. No marketing or analytics trackers are used on this website.

info.label: Auskunft (Information)
info.desc: You have the right to request information about whether your data is being processed, what data is stored, and the purpose of the processing.

correction.label: Berichtigung (Correction)
correction.desc: You have the right to request the immediate correction of any inaccurate or incomplete personal data.

deletion.label: Löschung (Deletion)
deletion.desc: You have the right to request the deletion of your data if it is no longer necessary for the purposes for which it was collected.

objection.label: Widerspruch (Objection)
objection.desc: You have the right to object to the processing of your data if we use it based on legitimate interests.

media.title: Externe Medien
media.cloudinaryDesc: Used as a CDN exclusively for the secure storage and fast delivery of images.
media.youtubeDesc: Videos from channels are embedded in enhanced privacy mode (erweiterter Datenschutzmodus).

complaint.title: Beschwerderecht (Art. 77 DSGVO)
complaint.desc: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent data protection supervisory authority.
